chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 214 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.4669/2022 (C/A) 07.12.2022 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Najaf Ali Janwri, Clerk of Municipal Committee, Khairpur is present on behalf of Accounts Officer, Municipal Committee, Khairpur and files compliance report together with two original cheques bearing No.37211636 and 38364884 dated 07.12.2022, amounting Rs.2,00,000/- (Rupees two lac) and Rs.1,86,311/- (Rupees one lac eighty six thousand three hundred eleven) respectively, making total of Rs.3,86,311/- (Rupees three lac eighty six thousand three hundred eleven), in favour of the petitioner, being outstanding amount towards the pensionary benefits of her deceased husband. The original cheques are received by the petitioner, who is present in person, under acknowledgment on photocopies of the cheques. Since all remaining outstanding dues have been paid to the petitioner, listed application stands disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
